content.hint: 先承认问题，再说明你将如何改进，重点在‘加入理论支持’

blanks.answer: revise it to include stronger theoretical support
options: revise it to include stronger theoretical support
ignore that part and move on
ask someone else to fix it for me

content.situation: 教授在论文反馈中指出你的分析缺乏深度，建议你加入更多理论支持。
content.speakerText: Your analysis is clear, but it needs more theoretical grounding. You can't just describe what happened—you need to explain why.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的分析很清晰，但缺乏理论支撑。你不能只描述发生了什么，还需要解释为什么。
content.knowledgePoint: 承认反馈 + 表达改进意愿
content.responseTemplate: You're absolutely right—I focused too much on description and neglected the theory. I'll ___.

content.hint: 承认理解问题，然后说明你会调整论证结构

blanks.answer: rework the logic connecting my claims to the data
options: rework the logic connecting my claims to the data
change all my data to match my conclusion
delete the conclusion and start over
just add more words to make it longer

content.situation: 教授指出你的论文结论与证据不匹配，建议你重新梳理逻辑。
content.speakerText: The evidence you present doesn't fully support your conclusion. You need to align your claims with your data.
content.speakerTextCn: 你提供的证据并不能充分支持你的结论，你需要让论点与数据保持一致。
content.knowledgePoint: 承认反馈 + 表达逻辑修正意愿
content.responseTemplate: That makes sense—I see the gap now. I'll ___ to make sure everything lines up.

content.hint: 先承认自己没意识到问题，再说明你会调整语言风格

blanks.answer: revise the language to be more formal
options: revise the language to be more formal
just delete all the words I used
ask my friend to rewrite it for me
keep it as is because it sounds natural

content.situation: 教授指出你的写作过于口语化，建议你使用更学术的表达方式。
content.speakerText: Your tone is too casual for academic writing. You need to use more formal language and avoid phrases like 'I think' or 'kind of'.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的语气对学术写作来说太随意了，需要使用更正式的语言，避免说‘我觉得’或‘有点’这类表达。
content.knowledgePoint: 承认反馈 + 表达语言风格调整意愿
content.responseTemplate: I hadn't realized how informal it sounded. I'll ___ to match academic standards.

content.hint: 描述证据不足时的常用词，与 'missing citations' 相呼应
content.template: You're right—I didn't realize how ___ the support was. I'll add sources right away.
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇：thin support（支持薄弱）

content.hint: 当被要求改变组织方式时，常用动词
content.template: Thanks for pointing that out. I'll ___ the structure to make it more thematic.
content.knowledgePoint: 核心动词搭配：restructure + structure（重新组织结构）

content.hint: 表达‘意识到问题’的关键动词，用于承认反馈
content.template: I ___ that I hadn't connected the conclusion to the research question. I'll fix it immediately.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：realize + that 从句（意识到…）
